ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: CONTAINS( Owner.UserRole.Name , "CSM") && ISCHANGED( Type ) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Upsell')) && NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Feature Update')) && ($Profile.Name !="System Administrator" ) && ($Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps Extended" ) && ($Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps") && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Rank_Ranger" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Acquired_Company"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: It is not possible to change the type of opportunity. Please contact salesops@similarweb.com for assistance.
